DEMO_END_MESSAGE: Thank you for playing the demo.
PROLOGUE_EXCERPT_02: They see your peace, woven of faith and toil,

PROLOGUE_EXCERPT_03: They forget your heart, bound in slumber and servitude,
PROLOGUE_EXCERPT_01: They see your beauty, so frail and fine,
PROLOGUE_EXCERPT_04: When you wake they shall see your truth,
PROLOGUE_EXCERPT_05: A beast’s nature bare to all.
